title: Crossbow Plus!
description: Now you can use anything as projectiles of crossbows!
body:
## Features
### More Projectiles
* All blocks and items can be charged into crossbows!
### More Special Projectiles
* Tnt, shulker bullets, wind charges, fireballs, end pearls, potions, spawn eggs and more! They can be shot as special entities, just like you use them!
### Bundles
* You can charge projectiles from a bundle!
### Compatible
* Projectiles are compatible with inifinity, multishot enchantments!
### New enchantments
* Add damage - add arrow damage.
* Reduce damage - reduce arrow damage.
* Headwear - blocks will be worn over mob's head.
* Instataneous explosion - tnt will explode immediately.

# Usage
* Pick items on offhand as projectiles of the crossbow.
